---
title: "Week 5 - Psych 214"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Class Slides and Materials

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="/dvcstats/slides/BE1introLM.html" width="100%" height="500px" title=""></iframe>
```

-   **CHECK-IN : [Practice Brain Exam (](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdlow6vZFcpooGbTACiW2HgsEfbVHkSarB2rZwpNvgUF-HyHQ/viewform?usp=header)**[tinyurl.com/modelpeople)](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdlow6vZFcpooGbTACiW2HgsEfbVHkSarB2rZwpNvgUF-HyHQ/viewform?usp=header)
-   **No R Today.**

## Announcements & Agenda

-   **8:55 - 9:30.** Check-In & Review

-   **9:30 - 9:45.** Brain Exam

-   **9:45 - 10:00.** BREAK TIME.

-   **10:00 - 11:00.** Introduction to Linear Models

## Due Next Week

1.  Read Chapter 6 and Quiz 6.
2.  No Lab.
